fields.NormalizedPosition: The scroll position between (0,0) and (1,1) with (0,0) being the lower left corner.
fields.ViewportOverride: Overrides the viewport of this scrollrect.
fields.__legacyContent: Internal - Used for the content of the scrollrect.

methods.MoveToTop: Moves the scroll view to the top.
methods.MoveToBottom: Mobes the scroll view to the bottom.
methods.MoveToLeft: Moves the scroll view to the left.
methods.MoveToRight: Moves the scroll view to the right.

usage: This is useful when you have a lot of text or other UIX elements that you want to be scrollable, much like how a webpage has a lot of content that can't fit in just one screen.
